trans-unit.source: Disable RTE: If this option is set the config for RTE will not load automatically. Include "FILE:EXT:nb_basetemplate/Configuration/TsConfig/Page/RTE.tsconfig" in your PageTsConfig to load the config manually.

Disable TCEFORM: If this option is set the config for TCEFORM will not load automatically. Include "FILE:EXT:nb_basetemplate/Configuration/TsConfig/Page/TCEFORM.tsconfig" in your PageTsConfig to load the config manually.

Disable TCEMAIN: If this option is set the config for TCEMAIN will not load automatically. Include "FILE:EXT:nb_basetemplate/Configuration/TsConfig/Page/TCEMAIN.tsconfig" in your PageTsConfig to load the config manually.

Disable TCA Defaults: If this option is set the config for TCAdefaults will not load automatically. Include "FILE:EXT:nb_basetemplate/Configuration/TsConfig/Page/TCADefaults.tsconfig" in your PageTsConfig to load the config manually.

Disable BackendLayouts: If this option is set the included backend layouts will not load automatically. Include "FILE:EXT:nb_basetemplate/Configuration/TsConfig/Page/Mod/WebLayout/BackendLayouts.tsconfig" in your PageTsConfig to load the config manually.

Disable Content Element PageTS Configuration: If this option is set, the included configuration for content elements will not be loaded automatically. Include "FILE:EXT:nb_basetemplate/Configuration/TsConfig/Page/ContentElement/All.tsconfig" in your PageTsConfig to load the config manually.
